info.title: Puddle Storefront API
info.description: The Puddle Storefront API provides endpoints for integrating the Puddle platform with external online stores, enabling seamless product management, order processing, and customer interactions.

get.description: Retrieves the currently authenticated customer session profile. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

parameters.name: authorization

schema.description: Bearer <storefront-public-key>

parameters.description: Bearer <storefront-public-key>

parameters.name: x-puddle-storefront-host

schema.description: Required for server-side callers when Origin/Referer is unavailable.

parameters.description: Required for server-side callers when Origin/Referer is unavailable.

x-scalar-examples.label: TypeScript

put.description: Updates the profile details for the authenticated customer. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable. Requires a valid customer session cookie for the resolved storefront.

parameters.name: authorization

schema.description: Bearer <storefront-public-key>

post.description: Initialises checkout for the current cart and returns the checkout session details. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

get.description: Retrieves the current number of items in the cart. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

x-scalar-examples.label: TypeScript

post.description: Migrates a guest cart into the authenticated customer cart when both are present. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

x-scalar-examples.label: TypeScript

get.description: Retrieves the current cart contents. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

x-scalar-examples.label: TypeScript
